revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Notice|This [[Wikipedia:Category|category]] is for {{{content|stories, characters, concepts and other things}}} related to [[creative work]]s of [[:en:Fiction|Fiction]]. Do not include things related to [[:en:Folklore|Folklore]], [[:en:Myth|mythology]] and [[:en:Religion|Religion]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|. For that, see ''{{Format link|Category:{{{1}}}}}''{{#if:{{{2|}}}| and ''{{Format link|Category:{{{2}}}}}''}}}}.}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Notice|This [[Wikipedia:Category|category]] is for {{{content|stories, characters, concepts and other things}}} related to [[creative work]]s of [[:en:Fiction|Fiction]]. Do not include things related to [[:en:Folklore|Folklore]], [[:en:Myth|mythology]] and [[:en:Religion|Religion]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|. For that, see ''{{Format link|Category:{{{1}}}}}''{{#if:{{{2|}}}| and ''{{Format link|Category:{{{2}}}}}''}}}}.}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}} </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{Notice|This [[Wikipedia:Category|category]] is for {{{content|stories, characters, concepts and other things}}} related to [[creative work]]s of [[:en:Fiction|Fiction]]. revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Notice|This [[Wikipedia:Category|category]] is for {{{content|stories, characters, concepts and other things}}} related to [[creative work]]s of [[:en:Fiction|Fiction]]. Do not include things related to [[:en:Folklore|Folklore]], [[:en:Myth|mythology]] and [[:en:Religion|Religion]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|. For that, see ''{{Format link|Category:{{{1}}}}}''{{#if:{{{2|}}}| and ''{{Format link|Category:{{{2}}}}}''}}}}.}}<noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fiction_category here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Fiction_category for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Notice|This [[Wikipedia:Category|category]] is for {{{content|stories, characters, concepts and other things}}} related to [[creative work]]s of [[:en:Fiction|Fiction]]. Do not include things related to [[:en:Folklore|Folklore]], [[:en:Myth|mythology]] and [[:en:Religion|Religion]]{{#if:{{{1|}}}|. For that, see ''{{Format link|Category:{{{1}}}}}''{{#if:{{{2|}}}| and ''{{Format link|Category:{{{2}}}}}''}}}}.}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
